## Alignment with project vision

How does this proposal fit AIPermission's local-only, single-user,
developer-focused design?

Please read [Project Principles](../../docs/project-principles.md) before
requesting hosted SaaS, multi-user RBAC, team collaboration, remote gateway
hosting, LAN-accessible deployments, or cloud-managed execution. Those requests
normally conflict with project principles and may be closed as `wontfix`.

## Security impact

Does this change affect credentials, command execution, token permissions, approvals, or backups?

## Breaking change

Would this require changes to any of the following?

- security model
- permission model
- MCP protocol behavior
- local-only architecture

If yes, explain.
